quiz.title: Grade 2 Reading – Short Stories & Questions
quiz.subject: Reading
quiz.description: Read short passages and answer who, what, where, why questions.

questions.question: The puppy ran to the park. He played with a red ball. Where did the puppy play?
Sara likes apples. She eats one every day after lunch. What does Sara eat?
It was a sunny day. The children flew kites high in the sky. Why could the kites fly high?
Tom has a new bike. It is blue and fast. What color is Tom's bike?
The bird built a nest in the tree. She used sticks and leaves. What did the bird use?
Mom made soup for dinner. It was hot and yummy. When did Mom make soup?
The cat slept all day. At night she ran around. When does the cat sleep?
We need water to live. Plants need water too. What do plants need?
Ben drew a picture of his dog. He used crayons. What did Ben draw?
The sun is very hot. We wear hats outside. Why do we wear hats?
